幸运快3大小单双计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239100513_64055267<br>vk.com/topic-239100475_63781516<br>vk.com/topic-239100532_64478618<br>vk.com/topic-239100533_64055268<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64199592<br>vk.com/topic-239100492_64478580<br>vk.com/topic-239100482_64478656<br>vk.com/topic-239100491_65517887<br>vk.com/topic-239100465_63781741<br>vk.com/topic-239100505_63781746<br>vk.com/topic-239100469_64637761<br>vk.com/topic-239100461_65517895<br>vk.com/topic-239100567_65313187<br>vk.com/topic-239100570_64941195<br>vk.com/topic-239100571_65517907<br>vk.com/topic-239100573_64055364<br>vk.com/topic-239100566_64199751<br>vk.com/topic-239100472_64478725<br>vk.com/topic-239014548_64369015<br>vk.com/topic-239079440_64941214<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64478735<br>vk.com/topic-239100576_64199778<br>vk.com/topic-239100565_63781761<br>vk.com/topic-239100526_64199759<br>vk.com/topic-239079436_64199812<br>vk.com/topic-239100507_65313243<br>vk.com/topic-239100501_65518039<br>vk.com/topic-239100496_64199849<br>vk.com/topic-239100516_64199850<br>vk.com/topic-239100907_65313318<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65518048<br>vk.com/topic-239100474_63865248<br>vk.com/topic-239100484_63865250<br>vk.com/to
